Custom Clothing Manufacturing in Sialkot, Pakistan

July 1, 2026 | By FABRIOZA

When global fashion brands, sports teams, and e-commerce entrepreneurs search for a reliable custom clothing manufacturer, one city consistently rises to the top of their list: Sialkot, Pakistan. This unassuming city in Punjab province has quietly become one of the world's most important centers for apparel manufacturing — and for good reason.

At FABRIOZA, we're proud to call Sialkot home. Our ISO 9001 certified facility has produced custom clothing for 500+ clients across 30+ countries, with a low MOQ of just 50 pieces and factory-direct pricing that cuts out the middleman.

Why Sialkot is the World's Clothing Manufacturing Hub

Sialkot's reputation isn't built on marketing — it's built on decades of craftsmanship. The city started as a center for sports goods manufacturing (producing footballs for FIFA World Cups and cricket gear for international teams) and naturally expanded into sportswear and apparel. Today, Sialkot-based manufacturers supply custom clothing to brands in the US, UK, Europe, Australia, and the Middle East.

Heritage of Craftsmanship

Three generations of skilled workers call Sialkot home. Pattern makers, cutters, sewers, and quality inspectors have honed their craft in this city's factories. The result? A workforce that understands garment construction at a deep, intuitive level — something that can't be replicated overnight.

Complete Supply Chain

Everything a clothing manufacturer needs exists within Sialkot's industrial zone: fabric merchants, button suppliers, thread manufacturers, packaging producers, and shipping agents. This vertical integration reduces lead times and costs.

Government Support

The Pakistani government offers export incentives, tax benefits, and infrastructure support to garment manufacturers in Sialkot. The Sialkot Export Processing Zone provides streamlined customs clearance and duty exemptions on imported raw materials.

ISO 9001 Certification: What It Means for You

FABRIOZA is ISO 9001:2015 certified — the internationally recognized standard for quality management systems. But what does this actually mean for your brand?

  • Documented Processes: Every step of production is standardized and recorded
  • Quality Control: 4-stage inspection with 99.4% first-pass approval rate
  • Continuous Improvement: Regular audits identify and fix issues before they affect your order
  • Traceability: Every garment can be traced back to its fabric batch and production line
  • Buyer Confidence: ISO certification is a trusted signal that separates professional manufacturers from fly-by-night operations

FABRIOZA's Manufacturing Capabilities

Cut & Sew Production

Full custom production from tech pack to finished garment. 15 automated production lines with 200+ skilled operators. Daily capacity: 2,500+ units.

Private Label & OEM/ODM

Custom labels, hang tags, packaging, and brand-ready finishing. Your brand, our factory.

Specialty Services

Embroidery (3D puff, flat, chain stitch), sublimation printing, screen printing, DTF, DTG, and garment washing.

Shipping from Pakistan to Your Door

We ship worldwide via DHL, FedEx, and UPS. Air freight delivers in 5-7 business days. Sea freight (for bulk orders) takes 25-35 days but costs significantly less. We handle all export documentation and customs paperwork.

DestinationAir FreightSea Freight
USA5-7 days25-30 days
UK5-7 days28-35 days
Australia6-8 days30-40 days
Canada5-7 days28-35 days
UAE/Middle East3-5 days18-25 days

How to Start Manufacturing with FABRIOZA

  1. Send Your Design: Tech pack, sketch, or reference image to info@fabrioza.com
  2. Receive Free Mockup: Digital preview within 24 hours
  3. Approve Sample: Physical sample in typically 1-3 weeks
  4. Production: 2-4 weeks bulk manufacturing
  5. Delivery: Quality-checked and shipped to your door
